spec.name: Job Search Automation API
spec.description: REST API contract for job search automation workflows including health checks, system metadata, and resume parsing.

tags.name: System
tags.description: System-level metadata endpoints such as menu and database diagnostics.

tags.name: Resume
tags.description: Resume parsing endpoints for extracting structured candidate profile data.

tags.name: Jobs
tags.description: Job search and storage endpoints used by the job dashboard.

tags.name: RAG
tags.description: Embedding generation and vector retrieval endpoints for retrieval-augmented workflows.

tags.name: Applications
tags.description: Application tracking endpoints for apply flow and status lifecycle.
